viewConfig: [{"key":"top","priority":true,"description":"Bird’s-eye shot looking directly down at the mouse from above"},{"key":"left","priority":true,"description":"Strict side profile from the left at eye level"},{"key":"angle","priority":true,"description":"Rear/top 3/4 angle showing the mouse from above and behind"},{"key":"sangle","priority":true,"description":"Front/side 3/4 angle at roughly 30–45 degrees"},{"key":"bottom","priority":false,"description":"Underside/belly view showing the base, sensor, mouse feet/skates"},{"key":"right","priority":false,"description":"Strict side profile from the right at eye level"},{"key":"front","priority":false,"description":"Head-on front view of the mouse"},{"key":"rear","priority":false,"description":"Head-on rear view showing the palm rest curvature"}]
loopViewPrompt_right: True right-side profile mouse product shot: long horizontal side silhouette with the right side wall, grip, or side buttons dominant and only minimal top surface visible; not a top-down or three-quarter shot.
loopViewPrompt_front: Nose/front-facing mouse product shot: camera faces the front edge of the mouse, with the front lip, USB/cable exit, scroll wheel/button-front shape, or nose profile visible; not a top-down shell shot.
loopViewPrompt_sangle: Front-side three-quarter mouse product shot: side geometry plus the front/nose/USB/cable/front-lip area are visible; low wide showcase angles are acceptable when the front-side geometry is clear.
loopViewPrompt_angle: Rear/top three-quarter mouse product shot: top shell plus one side with rear or palm-rest curvature dominant; not a pure top-down shot and not a front/nose-dominant sangle shot.
priorityViewPrompt_right: True right-side profile mouse product shot: long horizontal side silhouette with the right side wall, grip, or side buttons dominant and only minimal top surface visible; not a top-down or three-quarter shot.
priorityViewPrompt_front: Nose/front-facing mouse product shot: camera faces the front edge of the mouse, with the front lip, USB/cable exit, scroll wheel/button-front shape, or nose profile visible; not a top-down shell shot.
priorityViewPrompt_sangle: Front-side three-quarter mouse product shot: side geometry plus the front/nose/USB/cable/front-lip area are visible; low wide showcase angles are acceptable when the front-side geometry is clear.
priorityViewPrompt_angle: Rear/top three-quarter mouse product shot: top shell plus one side with rear or palm-rest curvature dominant; not a pure top-down shot and not a front/nose-dominant sangle shot.
additionalViewPrompt_right: True right-side profile mouse product shot: long horizontal side silhouette with the right side wall, grip, or side buttons dominant and only minimal top surface visible; not a top-down or three-quarter shot.
additionalViewPrompt_front: Nose/front-facing mouse product shot: camera faces the front edge of the mouse, with the front lip, USB/cable exit, scroll wheel/button-front shape, or nose profile visible; not a top-down shell shot.
additionalViewPrompt_sangle: Front-side three-quarter mouse product shot: side geometry plus the front/nose/USB/cable/front-lip area are visible; low wide showcase angles are acceptable when the front-side geometry is clear.
additionalViewPrompt_angle: Rear/top three-quarter mouse product shot: top shell plus one side with rear or palm-rest curvature dominant; not a pure top-down shot and not a front/nose-dominant sangle shot.
